payable","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"stateMutability":"payable","type":"receive"}],"devdoc":{"author":"Arca (arcabot.eth) + Felipe (@felirami)","details":"Snapshot-weighted allocation: early contributors get up to 1.5x more tokens. How it works:   1. Anyone sends ETH (0.01\u20131 ETH per wallet).   2. ETH forwards immediately to the Gnosis Safe vault.   3. The contract records totalRaised at the moment of each contribution.   4. Token allocation weight = amount \u00d7 multiplier(totalRaised_at_time).   5. Multiplier decays quadratically: 1.5\u00d7 for the first wei, 1.0\u00d7 at hard cap. Multiplier formula (basis points):   m = MAX_MULT - (MAX_MULT - MIN_MULT) \u00d7 (raised / hardCap)\u00b2   MAX_MULT = 15000 (1.5\u00d7)  MIN_MULT = 10000 (1.0\u00d7) OG wallets from the V1 presale get an additional 10% bonus on top. Security:   - Zero ETH held in contract (immediate vault forwarding)   - No unbounded loops in write functions (O(1) contributions)   - Checks-effects-interactions pattern   - Partial fill at hard cap (excess returned)   - ERC-20 rescue for accidental token transfers   - startTime gate prevents contributions before launch   - Fully verified on BaseScan","kind":"dev","methods":{"currentPriceInfo()":{"returns":{"bps":"Multiplier in basis points","label":"\"1.50x\" style label"}}},"title":"ArcaPresaleV3","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"currentMultiplier()":{"notice":"Get the current multiplier (what a new contributor would get right now)"},"currentPriceInfo()":{"notice":"Get the current price ratio as a human-readable string hint"},"getAllContributions()":{"notice":"Get detailed contribution data for airdrop calculation"},"getAllocationWeight(address)":{"notice":"Total allocation weight for a wallet (sum of each contribution \u00d7 its multiplier + OG bonus)"},"getContributionDetails(address)":{"notice":"Get a wallet's individual contributions (for NFT rendering)"}},"notice":"Bonding curve presale for $ARCA on Base","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/ArcaPresaleV3.sol":"ArcaPresaleV3"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"src/ArcaPresaleV3.sol":{"keccak256":"0x29cef88dff303c422a85e04159484c424b3b4bb5fa24be68dc772bd29034ffcb","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://40c7cc14af028ae7522ad75944e13ad91d6f715bfb58c7357875a24630d2785d","dweb:/ipfs/QmaFHPtVkY2Eu4fPsqesewLZ1ib3qGhUuEeqktcwv2bRMY"]}},"version":1}

currentMultiplier().notice: Get the current multiplier (what a new contributor would get right now)

currentPriceInfo().notice: Get the current price ratio as a human-readable string hint

getAllContributions().notice: Get detailed contribution data for airdrop calculation

getAllocationWeight(address).notice: Total allocation weight for a wallet (sum of each contribution × its multiplier + OG bonus)

getContributionDetails(address).notice: Get a wallet's individual contributions (for NFT rendering)
